labels.value:
'" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">Pay Now


Thank you for your business , we appreciate it very much.'
Your statement is attached. Please remit payment at your earliest convenience.
Select a Price Book to associate with this Order. You can add products only from the Price Book you associate with this Order. Changing the Price Book not allowed once associated.
